name: FIN - Processar regra faturamento mensal (corrigido anti-loop)

assignments.name: query
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const ids=$json.chunkIds||[]; if(!Array.isArray(ids) || ids.length===0){ throw new Error('Chunk vazio: chunkIds sem IDs (evita chamada GraphQL)'); } const vars={}; const parts=[]; for(let i=0;i<ids.length;i++){ vars['id'+i]=String(ids[i]); parts.push(`c${i}: card(id: $id${i}) { id title current_phase { id name } fields { field { id label type } value report_value array_value } }`); } const decl=Object.keys(vars).map(k=>`$${k}: ID!`).join(', '); return `query CardsBatch(${decl}) { ${parts.join(' ')} }`; })() }}

assignments.name: variables
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const ids=$json.chunkIds||[]; if(!Array.isArray(ids) || ids.length===0){ return {}; } const vars={}; for(let i=0;i<ids.length;i++){ vars['id'+i]=String(ids[i]); } return vars; })() }}

parameters.query: mutation CreateInvoice($input: CreateCardInput!) { createCard(input: $input) { card { id title url } } }

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const hasTransportError=Boolean($json.error); const gqlErrors=Array.isArray($json.errors)?$json.errors:[]; const cardId=$json.data?.createCard?.card?.id; return !hasTransportError && gqlErrors.length===0 && !!cardId; })() }}

parameters.query: mutation CreateItem($input: CreateCardInput!) { createCard(input: $input) { card { id url } } }

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const hasTransportError=Boolean($json.error); const gqlErrors=Array.isArray($json.errors)?$json.errors:[]; const cardId=$json.data?.createCard?.card?.id; return !hasTransportError && gqlErrors.length===0 && !!cardId; })() }}

parameters.query: mutation UpdateParcelas($cardId: ID!, $value: [UndefinedInput!]!) { updateFieldsValues(input: { nodeId: $cardId, values: [{ fieldId: "parcelas_pagas", value: $value }] }) { success userErrors { field message } } }

parameters.query: mutation LinkInvoiceOnItem($itemId: ID!, $value: [UndefinedInput!]!) { updateFieldsValues(input: { nodeId: $itemId, values: [{ fieldId: "id_da_fatura", value: $value }] }) { success userErrors { field message } } }

query FindInvoicesForRuleRecheck($pipeId: ID!, $fieldId: String!, $competencia: String!, $first: Int!) { findCards(pipeId: $pipeId, first: $first, search: { fieldId: $fieldId, fieldValue: $competencia }) { edges { node { id title fields { field { id label type } value report_value array_value } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
parameters.variables: ={{ (() => { const cc = ($json.createContext && typeof $json.createContext==='object') ? $json.createContext : {}; const lk = (cc.recheckLookup && typeof cc.recheckLookup==='object') ? cc.recheckLookup : (($json.recheckLookup && typeof $json.recheckLookup==='object') ? $json.recheckLookup : {}); return { pipeId: Number(lk.pipeId || 306859731), fieldId: String(lk.competenciaFieldId || 'data_de_compet_ncia'), competencia: String(lk.competenciaYMD || ''), first: 200 }; })() }}
